description_long: This is a full-sized acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a light-colored wooden top with a visible grain pattern and a contrasting dark pickguard. The sides and back are a rich, medium-brown wood, and the neck is similarly finished in a warm brown tone. The guitar has six metallic tuning pegs arranged symmetrically on a rectangular headstock, and six strings run from the bridge on the body up to the headstock. The soundhole is round and centrally located, bordered by a subtle rosette. The bridge and fretboard are darker wood, and the body has a slight arch, giving it a robust, resonant appearance. This instrument is designed for musical performance and is commonly seen in urban environments such as parks, street corners, and music venues.
description: A classic dreadnought acoustic guitar with a light wood top, dark pickguard, and six-string setup, featuring a brown neck and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light wood top, round soundhole, dark pickguard, bridge, and all six strings.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's depth, arched body, and the thickness of the neck and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the medium-brown wooden back, neck, and the symmetrical headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same depth and curvature as the other side, with the neck and body thickness visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, and a simple, traditional contour.
